Windows.L177: Unhide additional rows for data entry using grouping: First, deactivate worksheet protection. Next, unhide rows by clicking on the grouping sign "+" (on the left). Do not forget to reactivate worksheet protection afterwards!
Windows.L178: Please follow the same steps in 'Shading' worksheet. For a detailed description, please refer to the PHPP manual.
Windows.L179: If more rows are needed, it is best to use the macros in the separate file: PHPP_V10.6_Tools.xlsm.
